title: ApprovalResult
description: Schema for user approval decisions on debate results or auto-triggered actions. Records the user's accept/reject/modify decision along with metadata for session history tracking.

type.description: Record type identifier for session history. debate_approval for legacy 3-choice flow, debate_result_handler for 4-choice handler flow.

session_id.description: The codex-collab session ID where this approval occurred.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the approval decision.

decision.description: User's decision: accepted (apply side's proposal), rejected (discard both), modify (apply with edits), or continue (additional debate round).

choice.description: The 4-choice handler selection from debate-result-handler.sh. apply_claude/apply_codex→decision:accepted, continue→decision:continue, discard→decision:rejected.

handler_status.description: Detailed outcome status from the debate-result-handler for the chosen action.

adopted_side.description: Which model's proposal was adopted (only present for apply_claude or apply_codex choices).

round.description: The debate round number at the time of the decision.

topic.description: The debate topic that produced this result.

applied.description: Whether the changes were applied (true for accepted/modify, false for rejected).

modifications.description: User-provided modification instructions when decision is 'modify'. Empty or absent for accept/reject.

trigger_source.description: How the debate was initiated — manual user command, auto-triggered by safety hook, or triggered by rule engine.
